label: 第67話
source_locator: 単行本8巻 目次 p.111
summary_short: 五条と夏油は天内理子と世話役の黒井美里に正式に会う。理子の残された日常を守りながら護衛する一方、伏黒甚爾は盤星教の賞金を利用した計画を動かす。
summary_full: 夏油はコークンを制圧し、五条もQ最高戦力のバイエルを退ける。Qは短時間で瓦解し、五条と夏油は星漿体・天内理子、世話役の黒井美里と合流する。理子は天元との同化を当然の使命として強気に振る舞うが、同化当日までは学校へ通うことを望む。甚爾は直接襲う前に、理子へ高額の懸賞金を設定し、多数の呪詛師に五条たちを狙わせる。護衛側を消耗させ、期限終了時の油断を突く狙いだった。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 五条悟 and 夏油傑 officially meet the 星漿体 Vessel , 天内理子 and her caretaker, 美里 黒井 . The boys realize that their mission to protect 理子 in her last days. Meanwhile, 伏黒甚爾 uses the money from the 盤星教 to put his scheme into action.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 悟 and 傑 force Q to disband. 傑 effortlessly immobilizes Q member Kokun with a curse that wants to kiss him. Kokun promises to quit being a 呪詛師 and grow rice on the countryside if 傑 lets him go. 傑 ignores him, irritating Kokun. The Q soldier threatens that Bayer , Q's strongest soldier, will come and kill them all. However, 傑 shows Kokun a picture with Bayer defeated by 悟 on his phone. With Q's strongest soldier defeated, the organization disbands. Meanwhile, 孔時雨 from the 盤星教 finds 伏黒甚爾 betting on a boat race. Apparently he used the thirty million yen advance to wear down the 五条家's boy and the sorcerers with him. The representative needs to bring back a report to his client and remains skeptical of 甚爾. 理子 meets her protectors. The assassin is confident he'll get a return on that money for sure, but he ends up losing his bet on the boat race. The representative reminds the Sorcerer Killer that he's counting on him and asks how 恵 is doing, but 甚爾 can't even remember who that is. Curse users come to collect the bounty on the 星漿体 Vessel. Back with the 星漿体 Vessel, 理子 awakens in 悟's arms and immediately attacks him. She believes them to be her attackers until her caretaker 美里 黒井 arrives. All of them get on the same page and 理子 begins to discuss her connection to 天元様. The two boys ignore her and she realizes that she's late for school. Rather than take her back to 東京 呪術高専, 理子 ends up back at Renchoku Girl's Junior High due to orders from 天元様. They are to oblige 理子's requests because she will no longer exist after the merger. It is their mission to allow her to enjoy herself, which 黒井 is thankful for. 傑 checks his surveillance curses and realizes that two of them have been taken out. They both head to find 理子 immediately while two curse users trespass on the campus. 甚爾 used a dark website for curse users to place a thirty million dollar bounty on 理子's head, and these men have come to collect the bounty.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: Kokun 夏油傑 天内理子 美里 黒井 五条悟 Bayer 伏黒甚爾 孔時雨 夜蛾正道 Bag-mask 呪詛師 Old 呪詛師
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 五条悟 & 夏油傑 vs. Bayer & Kokun (終了)
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 夏油傑の術式 呪霊操術

key_events_verified_phase4: 理子と黒井が護衛側へ合流する
甚爾が懸賞金で護衛を消耗させる策を開始する
verification_notes_phase4: 集英社公式8・9巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第四段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
